parameters: Used the Shingana's Old Fort Key!
How nostalgic... The ruins of the town where the battle was held
My husband was a dragon maniac. He used to collect all sorts of
dragon stuff. Now he's gone and I'm a slave.
If anyone ever grants me my freedom, I'll let them have what's left
of his old collection. As if that day would ever come.
Shingana's been destroyed! The slaves have all been set free!
We can finally earn a wage and own homes again!
It was you, wasn't it? You're the ones who freed us.
Please, take this! It's my husband's collection! I want you to have it!
...Eh? It's not all that? My husband used to say it was worth quite
a lot of money. You don't want it?
Used the Secret Shingana's Old Fort Key!
We've made our way inside the fort! The king has to be in here
The horribly twisted body of a slave.
An old treasure chest wrapped in chains. You'll need the password
for the lock to open it.
It won't open without a key. There's a bat symbol etched into the lock.
Used the Shingana's Old Fort Bat Key!
I became a soldier of Shingana to look for strong opponents.
War is all Shingana knows how to do.
And yet, the demons managed to conquer it while I was away.
A weak country... isn't the country for me.
Someone opened my treasure chest. Not that it's anything worth
kicking up a fuss over. It only had my notes inside it.
A good fighter can use them to become an even better fighter,
and that's exactly the kind of person I'd want to find them.
